div.h1: B-Tree Node Memory Layout: Table Leaf (0x0D) vs. Interior (0x05)
div.h3: SQLite Database File Format Reference (Architecture Specification)

ol.li: Traverse Page 1 (Root): 83 satisfies 51 ≤ Key ≤ 100. Extract left_child pointer.
Seek to Page 3 (Interior): Search Cell Pointers. 83 is greater than separator_key = 75.
Follow Right Child: Since 83 > all cell keys in Pg 3, follow the right_child header field to Page 9.
Leaf Access (Page 9): Binary search the sorted Cell Pointer Array for RowID 83.
Data Extraction: Compute offset from pointer, parse Varints, and return record_body.

g.title: Stores routing keys and page pointers

div.p: Page Header (8 Bytes) 0x00 [1B] : page_type = 0x0D (Leaf) 0x01 [2B] : first_freeblock (offset) 0x03 [2B] : cell_count (N) 0x05 [2B] : cell_content_start (offset) 0x07 [1B] : fragmented_free_bytes
Cell Pointer Array [Offset 0...2*N] Array of 2-byte offsets to cell contents. Stored in Key (RowID) order. Grows Downward ↓
Unallocated / Free Space Available for new cell pointers and cell data.
Cell Content (Data Payloads) Grows Upward ↑ [varint] : Payload Size [varint] : RowID (Integer Primary Key) [bytes] : Serialized Record Data
Page Header (12 Bytes) 0x00 [1B] : page_type = 0x05 (Interior) 0x01 [7B] : (Shared fields: freeblock, count, etc.) 0x08 [4B] : right_child (Page ID pointer) ★
Cell Pointer Array [Offset 0...2*N] Array of 2-byte offsets to separators. Grows Downward ↓
Cell Content (Routing) Grows Upward ↑ [4B] : left_child_page (Page ID) [varint] : separator_key (Max RowID in subtree) Note: No user data stored in Interior nodes

g.title: Stores routing keys and page pointers
